# /impact

> Surface existing integration interfaces (Functions / Logic Apps / topics / queues / pipelines / SQL procs) the proposed feature will touch.

## Usage

```
/impact [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/spec.md`
- `agents/brownfield/_brownfield/inventory.json` (when brownfield mode)
- Sibling features under `projects/{p}/integration/features/*/`
- `projects/{p}/integration/{fdd,tdd,blueprint}.md`

## Execution flow

1. Read spec; extract referenced resource patterns (function names, topic names, pipeline names, APIM operations).
2. Cross-reference brownfield inventory + sibling specs.
3. Emit `impact.md` with:
   - **Existing resources touched** (one row per Azure resource) with risk
   - **Pattern collisions** — same topic with conflicting subscriber sets; same APIM API with conflicting rate-limits
   - **Network / VNet impact** — new subnet ranges, NSG rule changes
   - **Cost impact** — new Premium SKU upgrades (Service Bus, APIM tier change)
   - **Regression surface** — downstream consumers + SLA dashboards
4. No gate transitions.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/impact.md`
